rows.label: xs33550100_MSG0020
rows.name: Me? Yes, as you can see, I'm fine.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33550100_MSG0030
rows.name:
I decided wandering alone would be unwise,
so I limited myself to observing the area.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33550100_MSG0040
rows.name:
But now that you've come,
there's no need to wait any longer.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33550100_MSG0050
rows.name:
Let's take back Al and the
Ares and end this battle.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33550100_MSG0060
rows.name:
We won't just keep having things taken from us[ST:wide ]—
we are the ones who will survive.[ST:wait ]
